summary: Comprehensive testing of FitMaxPro P2 features - All 20 backend tests passed. Frontend Admin tabs verified working.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/admin/inactive-users?days=7 - Returns inactive users list with threshold
Backend: GET /api/admin/inactive-users?days=3 - Works with 3 days threshold
Backend: GET /api/admin/inactive-users?days=14 - Works with 14 days threshold
Backend: GET /api/admin/inactive-users?days=30 - Works with 30 days threshold
Backend: GET /api/admin/inactive-users requires VIP authentication (401 without auth)
Backend: POST /api/admin/inactive-users/send-reminder - Endpoint exists and accepts user IDs
Backend: POST /api/admin/inactive-users/send-reminder - Handles non-existent users gracefully
Backend: GET /api/subscription/can-cancel - Returns can_cancel status and plan info
Backend: GET /api/subscription/can-cancel requires authentication (401)
Backend: POST /api/subscription/request-cancel requires authentication (401)
Backend: GET /api/admin/cancellation-requests - Returns requests list
Backend: GET /api/admin/cancellation-requests requires VIP auth (401)
Backend: PUT /api/admin/cancellation-requests/{id}/process requires VIP auth (401)
Backend: GET /api/iap/products - Returns 4 IAP products (PUBLIC endpoint)
Backend: IAP products have proper structure with product_id, name_fr, name_en, price_tier, duration, features
Backend: Annual IAP products have discount_percent field
Backend: POST /api/iap/verify-purchase requires authentication (401)
Backend: POST /api/iap/verify-purchase returns MOCKED pending status (RevenueCat key not configured)
Backend: Subscriber can like reviews via POST /api/reviews/{id}/like
Backend: Reviews have likes_count and likes array fields
Frontend: Admin 'Inactive Alerts' tab visible with day selector (3, 7, 14, 30 days)
Frontend: Admin 'Inactive Alerts' tab has custom message input, select all/deselect buttons
Frontend: Admin 'Inactive Alerts' tab shows inactive users table with proper columns
Frontend: Admin 'Subscriptions' tab visible with 'Cancellation Requests' section
Frontend: Admin 'Subscriptions' tab shows 'Annual Subscription Rules' (12-month commitment)
Frontend: Admin 'Subscriptions' tab has 'Cancellation History' section
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - tested existing functionality
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P2 features verified: 1) Inactive users alert system with 3/7/14/30 day thresholds, custom message, and send reminder functionality. 2) Annual subscription cancellation logic with 12-month commitment and admin approval workflow. 3) IAP preparation with 4 products (RevenueCat MOCKED). 4) Subscriber like on reviews working. Admin tabs 'Inactive Alerts' and 'Subscriptions' functioning correctly.

mocked_apis.RevenueCat: POST /api/iap/verify-purchase returns {status: 'pending'} without actual API call
mocked_apis.Resend Email: POST /api/admin/inactive-users/send-reminder stores in pending_emails if RESEND_API_KEY not configured properly

inactive_users_api.GET /api/admin/inactive-users: YES - Returns inactive users with days threshold (3, 7, 14, 30)
inactive_users_api.POST /api/admin/inactive-users/send-remi: YES - Accepts user_ids array, sends email reminders (MOCKED without Resend key)

subscription_cancellation.GET /api/subscription/can-cancel: YES - Returns can_cancel, plan_type, message with 12-month commitment logic for annual
subscription_cancellation.POST /api/subscription/request-cancel: YES - Creates cancellation request for admin approval

iap_products.GET /api/iap/products: YES - Returns 4 products: standard_monthly, standard_annual, vip_monthly, vip_annual
iap_products.POST /api/iap/verify-purchase: YES - MOCKED: Returns pending status without RevenueCat API key

subscriber_likes.reviews_structure: YES - Reviews have likes_count and likes array

frontend_admin_tabs.Inactive Alerts: YES - Tab with day selector, custom message, send reminder button
frontend_admin_tabs.Subscriptions: YES - Tab with cancellation requests section and annual rules info
